title: CompText AIR Evidence
description: JSON schema for verifiable evidence associated with AIR artifacts.

air_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the associated AIR artifact.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the evidence was recorded.

executor_id.description: Identifier for the entity that executed the command (e.g., agent, human).

command_executed.description: The command or action that was executed.

output_log_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the output log generated by the command execution.

result_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the result or outcome of the command execution.
